Our developers are aware of the situation and are currently investigating it further. In the meantime, we recommend [creating an Advanced connection by creating your own custom application and using the OAuth credentials to establish the connection](https://apps.make.com/reddit#obtain-your-oauth2-credentials-in-your-reddit-acco), as a workaround. Thank you for your understanding. metadata.description: I record every Zoom meeting with Fathom, and we have MANY teaching sessions and agreement meetings each week. Fathom creates very useful AI summaries that I want to automatically copy to individual text files in a Dropbo…
metadata.ogDescription: I record every Zoom meeting with Fathom, and we have MANY teaching sessions and agreement meetings each week. Fathom creates very useful AI summaries that I want to automatically copy to individual text files in a Dropbox folder. Google Docs or Sheets would also work for us. Has anyone been able to link Fathom with any success? Or is there a built-in integration slated for Fathom in the near future?
metadata.og:title: Has anyone been able to link Fathom Notetaker in Make? - Questions - Make Community
